description: Electronic VT record lifecycle, left to right: camera capture with HI-RES grid badge + crossed-out compression-artifact badge; vault-protected unedited ORIGINAL image file (closed padlock, write-protect shield w/ crossed pencil); enhanced COPY with brightness slider + ADJ LOG sheet (+1 EV, INIT/DATE); archive box PER CODE + retention clock. Flow arrows draw on: capture->original, original->copy, original->retention. Ghost scaffold with stage numbers always visible. Bottom strip left clear for note chip.
